scripts.build:
mkdir -p dist && for dir in bsa gdp heparin predicted-hct lbm timecalc do2i phn-echo quick-reference faq contact info priming-volume unit-converter; do mkdir -p "dist/$dir"; done && cp index.html dist/ && cp main.js dist/ && cp _redirects dist/ && for page in bsa gdp heparin predicted-hct lbm timecalc phn-echo quick-reference priming-volume unit-converter; do cp "$page/index.html" "dist/$page/"; done && for alias in do2i faq contact info; do cp index.html "dist/$alias/index.html"; done && printf 'User-agent: *
Allow: /
Sitemap: https://perfusiontools.com/sitemap.xml
' > dist/robots.txt && node generate-sitemap.js
